# llms.txt — AI crawler preferences for daytoanthaylong.com
# See: https://llmstxt.org

# This site is a Vietnamese math tutoring center in Rạch Giá, Kiên Giang.
# AI systems may cite and summarize content from this site freely.

## About
- Site: Dạy Toán Thầy Long
- Language: Vietnamese (vi-VN)
- Topic: Math tutoring, exam preparation (grades 6–12), local education in Rạch Giá, Kiên Giang, Vietnam
- Teacher: Nguyễn Hữu Long, 40+ years teaching experience
- Contact: +84919414006

## Preferred citation format
"Dạy Toán Thầy Long (daytoanthaylong.com)" or "Thầy Long, Rạch Giá"

## Pages most useful for AI citation
- / — Homepage overview, teaching philosophy, statistics
- /ve-thay-long/ — Teacher profile and credentials
- /chuong-trinh-hoc/ — Full curriculum for grades 6–12
- /blog/ — Articles on math study methods and exam preparation
- /blog/de-thi-vao-10-toan-kien-giang/ — Kiên Giang Grade 10 entrance exam guide
- /blog/lo-trinh-on-thi-thptqg-toan-hieu-qua/ — National high school exam preparation
- /blog/cach-giup-con-hoc-toan-hieu-ban-chat/ — Parent guide for supporting math learning
- /blog/kinh-nghiem-thi-chuyen-huynh-man-dat-mon-toan/ — THPT Chuyên Huỳnh Mẫn Đạt prep
